ddls:
CREATE TABLE "bulk_supply_points" (
  "bsp_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each bulk supply point */,
  "bsp_name" TEXT /* Name of the bulk supply point */,
  "grid_supply_point" TEXT /* Grid supply point that it is connected to */,
  "licence_area" TEXT /* Licensing area for regulatory compliance */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Geographic latitude of the bulk supply point */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Geographic longitude of the bulk supply point */,
  "capacity" REAL /* Maximum capacity of the bulk supply point in MW */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current operational status */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date when the bulk supply point was installed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bsp_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "scenarios" (
  "scenario_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each scenario */,
  "scenario_name" TEXT /* Name of the scenario */,
  "output_parameter_unit" TEXT /* Unit of the output parameter */,
  "output_parameter" TEXT /* Description of the output parameter */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the scenario */,
  "start_year" INTEGER /* Starting year of the scenario */,
  "end_year" INTEGER /* Ending year of the scenario */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the scenario */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the scenario was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("scenario_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_scenarios_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "forecasts" (
  "forecast_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each forecast entry */,
  "bsp_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the bulk supply point */,
  "scenario_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the forecasting scenario */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the forecast */,
  "forecast_value" REAL /* Forecasted value for the given year */,
  "confidence_level" REAL /* Confidence level of the forecast */,
  "methodology" TEXT /* Methodology used for the forecast */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the forecast */,
  "last_updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("forecast_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_forecasts_bsp_id FOREIGN KEY ("bsp_id") REFERENCES bulk_supply_points ("bsp_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_forecasts_scenario_id FOREIGN KEY ("scenario_id") REFERENCES scenarios ("scenario_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_forecasts_last_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for login */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address for user notifications */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, admin, operator) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number for user contact */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department to which the user belongs */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user accessing the system */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the access event */,
  "action" TEXT /* Type of action performed (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  "session_id" TEXT /* ID of the session associated with the access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
